examples: Of course, mercantilist thinking has moved on since the 18th century.
It is a rather mercantilist attitude to culture, but then it is only following a well-trodden path.
Mr Hickey sees China's currency policy as part of "a mercantilist plan" to gain market share in the US.
Mercantilist thinking is based on the idea that economic wealth is finite and based on land.
Mercantilist arguments only ensure that every step forward on trade requires a full-fledged battle.
